title: ICMR NITVAR Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Consultant Posts
description: National Institute of Translational Virology and AIDS Research (ICMR NITVAR) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for various Consultant Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the MBBS, BDS, B.V.Sc, MD/ MS, Ph.D, and M.V.Sc can use this opportunity and apply for the ICMR NITVAR Notification 2026 . Here we mentioned more details about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. In...
